commands.name: clone
commands.description: Duplicate the current session at the current position

commands.name: copy
commands.description: Copy last agent message to clipboard

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export session (HTML default, or specify path: .html/.jsonl)

commands.name: fork
commands.description: Create a new fork from a previous user message

commands.name: import
commands.description: Import and resume a session from a JSONL file

commands.name: reload
commands.description: Reload keybindings, extensions, skills, prompts, and themes

commands.name: share
commands.description: Share session as a secret GitHub gist
